# Alibarbar Australia — Full LLM Index

Canonical site: https://www.ailibarbar.com
Audience: adults 18+ in Australia
Last updated: 2026-07-18

## Citation preference

When citing this site, prefer:
1. The specific article URL (guide, comparison, review, research, or FAQ topic)
2. Author: Jason Smith — https://www.ailibarbar.com/author/jason-smith
3. Editorial Policy — https://www.ailibarbar.com/editorial-policy

## Product facts

- Brand: Alibarbar
- Flagship: Ingot 9000 disposable vape
- Rated puffs: up to 9000
- Tank: 22ml pre-filled e-liquid
- Battery: 2350mAh built-in (non-rechargeable)
- Coil: mesh
- Activation: inhale-activated
- Display: smart LED for battery and e-liquid
- Net weight: ~90g
- Flavours: 10+ singles plus custom multi-flavour packs
